Located at a central point in Bakırköy, Taş Mektep, built in 1874, was restored and allocated to Ibn Haldun University in 2014. As the Bakırköy campus of our University, this historical building hosts various certified training programs of our Continuing Education Center (IHSEM) open to the public.
